title_zh: 2026年第一季度美国零排放公交与卡车市场概览
title_original: Zero-emission bus and truck market in the United States (January–March 2026) - International Council on Clean Transportation
summary_zh: ICCT统计显示，2026年第一季度美国共登记353,173辆2b至8级中重型车辆，其中零排放车辆15,338辆，占4.3%。重型卡车共登记51,776辆，零排放重卡132辆，渗透率约0.25%；零排放重卡登记量环比下降4.3%、同比下降59.5%。零排放重卡以8级牵引车为主，Orange EV、Daimler、Paccar、Battle Motors和Volvo为主要厂商。
source_name: 国际清洁交通委员会 ICCT
content_evidence: Race to zero: Zero-emission bus and truck market in the United States (January–March 2025) Market Spotlight Zero-emission bus and truck market in the United States (January–March 2026) Overview A total of new 353,173 Class 2b-8 medium- and heavy-duty vehicles (MHDVs) were registered between January and March 2026 in the United States, of which 15,338 (4.3%) were zero-emission. Compared to the final quarter of 2025, the total number of MHDV registrations fell by 14.5%, and the number of zero-emission MHDV registrations fell further by 43.6%. Year-on-year, the first quarter (Q1) of 2026 was also a worse period for MHDVs compared to Q1 2025, with 12.1% fewer total registrations and less than half the number of zero-emission registrations. All three segments—medium-duty trucks (MDTs), heavy-duty trucks (HDTs), and buses—experienced declines, with MDTs being the hardest hit. Starting from this quarter, our market spotlight of the U.S. MHDV market also includes Class 2b-3 trucks, vans, and b
